subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Thy detailed letter was carefully perused. Time being limited, a brief reply is herewith penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مکتوب مفصل بدقت ملاحظه گردید فرصت نیست مختصر جواب مرقوم میشود
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @education of children; moral education, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
